items.label: Frame or unibody damage
items.hint: Look under car for bent metal, fresh welds, misaligned seams

items.label: Flood or water damage signs
items.hint: Waterline stains in door jambs, rust in unusual spots, musty smell

items.label: Panel gaps & alignment
items.hint: Uneven gaps between doors, hood, trunk suggest prior collision repair

items.label: Paint color matching
items.hint: Check panels in sunlight — mismatched shades indicate repaint

items.label: Rust spots & bubbling paint
items.hint: Check rocker panels, wheel arches, and undercarriage

items.label: Glass — chips, cracks, seals
items.hint: Windshield cracks spread; check all window seals for leaks

items.label: Lights — all operational
items.hint: Headlights, taillights, turn signals, reverse, brake lights

items.label: Tires — tread depth & wear
items.hint: Uneven wear suggests alignment or suspension issues

items.label: Wheel condition
items.hint: Curb rash, cracks, bent rims

items.label: Door operation
items.hint: All doors open, close, and latch properly including hinge condition

items.label: Hood & trunk latches
items.hint: Secure, aligned, no gaps when closed

items.label: Mirrors — condition
items.hint: Power fold/adjust if equipped; no cracks

items.label: Wipers
items.hint: Blade condition, washer fluid spray

items.label: Exhaust pipe condition
items.hint: Excessive black soot, oil residue, or rust holes

items.label: Odometer rollback signs
items.hint: Worn pedals / steering wheel inconsistent with low mileage

items.label: Mold, mildew, or musty smell
items.hint: Check under seats and carpet edges — sign of water intrusion

items.label: Airbag warning light
items.hint: If illuminated, airbags may be deployed or disabled — costly fix

items.label: All dashboard warning lights
items.hint: Start engine and note any persistent warning lights after warm-up

items.label: AC & heat operation
items.hint: Test all fan speeds and both hot/cold extremes

items.label: Infotainment & electronics
items.hint: Radio, navigation, Bluetooth, backup camera, USB ports

items.label: Power windows & locks
items.hint: All switches from both driver and passenger sides

items.label: Seat adjustment & condition
items.hint: All positions, heating/cooling if equipped, no tears or burns

items.label: Seatbelts — retract & latch
items.hint: All rows; check pretensioner status

items.label: Sunroof operation
items.hint: Opens, closes, tilts; check seal for leaks

items.label: Trunk space & spare tire
items.hint: Spare present and inflated; jack and tools present

items.label: Pedal condition
items.hint: Worn-through rubber inconsistent with claimed mileage

items.label: Smoke from engine bay
items.hint: Any smoke color after warm-up is a serious red flag

items.label: Milky or frothy oil
items.hint: Check dipstick — white/grey coloring indicates coolant mixing (head gasket)

items.label: Coolant in oil or vice versa
items.hint: Check coolant reservoir for oily film on cap

items.label: Oil level & condition
items.hint: Low level or very dark/dirty oil suggests neglected maintenance

items.label: Coolant level & condition
items.hint: Should be between min/max; look for rust or debris in reservoir

items.label: Belt condition
items.hint: Serpentine belt: check for cracks, fraying, glazing

items.label: Hose condition
items.hint: Squeeze radiator hoses — should be firm, not soft, cracked, or bulging

items.label: Brake fluid level
items.hint: Should be at or near max line

items.label: Power steering fluid
items.hint: Check level and color

items.label: Transmission fluid
items.hint: Color should be red/pink, not brown or burnt-smelling

items.label: Battery terminals
items.hint: Check for corrosion, secure connection

items.label: Signs of recent cleaning
items.hint: A suspiciously clean engine bay may be hiding leaks

items.label: Check engine or warning lights
items.hint: Any persistent light after warm-up requires OBD scan before purchase

items.label: Pulls hard to one side braking
items.hint: Indicates uneven braking — possible caliper or rotor issue

items.label: Vibration in steering wheel
items.hint: At highway speed: wheels need balancing or alignment

items.label: Brake feel & noise
items.hint: Spongy pedal, grinding, or squealing under braking

items.label: Transmission shifts
items.hint: Hard shifts, slipping, hesitation, or jerking between gears

items.label: Unusual engine noises
items.hint: Knocking, ticking, rattling at idle or under acceleration

items.label: Suspension noise over bumps
items.hint: Clunking or creaking suggests worn struts, ball joints, or sway bar links

items.label: Cold start behavior
items.hint: Ask to see a cold start — excessive smoke or rough idle is a concern

items.label: Acceleration & throttle
items.hint: Hesitation or stumble under full throttle

items.label: Steering feel
items.hint: Loose, vague, or notchy steering can indicate wear

items.label: AC performance at speed
items.hint: Test on highway — some systems struggle under load

items.label: Title — clean vs salvage
items.hint: Salvage title = car was totaled; dramatically affects resale and insurability

items.label: VIN matches title, dash, jamb
items.hint: Mismatched VINs can indicate fraud or stolen vehicle

items.label: Number of previous owners
items.hint: More owners = harder to verify maintenance history

items.label: Accident history (Carfax)
items.hint: Run a report — seller should provide or split the cost

items.label: Service records
items.hint: Oil changes, timing belt, major repairs — regularity matters

items.label: Recall status
items.hint: Check NHTSA.gov — open recalls should be resolved before purchase

items.label: Registration current
items.hint: Verify tags are not expired

items.label: Lien check
items.hint: Confirm no outstanding loan — seller must pay off before transfer
